operation.name: write_at_postproc_build_desc_ring
preconditions:
(set-logic QF_AUFBV )
(declare-fun desc_count () (Array (_ BitVec 32) (_ BitVec 8) ) )
(declare-fun index () (Array (_ BitVec 32) (_ BitVec 8) ) )
(assert (let ( (?B1 (concat  (select  index (_ bv3 32) ) (concat  (select  index (_ bv2 32) ) (concat  (select  index (_ bv1 32) ) (select  index (_ bv0 32) ) ) ) ) ) ) (and  (bvult  ?B1 (concat  (select  desc_count (_ bv3 32) ) (concat  (select  desc_count (_ bv2 32) ) (concat  (select  desc_count (_ bv1 32) ) (select  desc_count (_ bv0 32) ) ) ) ) ) (=  false (bvult  ?B1 (_ bv64 32) ) ) ) ) )
(check-sat)
(exit)
(set-logic QF_AUFBV )
(declare-fun desc_count () (Array (_ BitVec 32) (_ BitVec 8) ) )
(declare-fun index () (Array (_ BitVec 32) (_ BitVec 8) ) )
(assert (let ( (?B1 (concat  (select  index (_ bv3 32) ) (concat  (select  index (_ bv2 32) ) (concat  (select  index (_ bv1 32) ) (select  index (_ bv0 32) ) ) ) ) ) ) (and  (bvult  ?B1 (concat  (select  desc_count (_ bv3 32) ) (concat  (select  desc_count (_ bv2 32) ) (concat  (select  desc_count (_ bv1 32) ) (select  desc_count (_ bv0 32) ) ) ) ) ) (bvult  ?B1 (_ bv64 32) ) ) ) )
(check-sat)
(exit)

oracle_spec.assertion: move_desc.src_offset stays within the domain its consumer's agreement governs
assumptions: producer sets src_offset without enforcing the consumer's cross-field invariant

metadata.wma: Logic-Induced Signal Divergence to Adversary-Controlled Memory Access
